sheets.name: README
headers: IBM QUOTING ASSISTANT — DATA SOURCE OF TRUTH

sheets.name: Verify_RU_Rates
headers: Driver: SSO/MFA/Adaptive Access are sized by Monthly Active Users (MAU). Lifecycle Mgmt & Governance and Analytics are sized by # Managed Users.  MAU = ROUNDUP(population x MIN(avg_logins_per_year,12)/12). RU price = $281.40 each (Verify_Parts). Annual list = Total RUs x $281.40 x #regions.

sheets.name: NS1_Pricing_Tiers
headers: Find the largest Tier Base <= client's MQ, then price ~= client MQ x that tier's Tier MRR. Example: 150 MQ -> tier base 100 -> $10 Tier MRR -> 150 x $10 = $1,500/month.
Find the largest Tier Base <= client's MQ, then price ~= client MQ x that tier's Tier MRR. Example: 150 MQ -> tier base 100 -> $10 Tier MRR -> 150 x $10 = $1,500/month.

sheets.name: Vault_Parts
headers: CRITICAL: Model A (Platform/RU) and Model B (Clients/RVU) may NOT be mixed for one customer. Advanced Support = matching 'Z' part at +15% of parent list (large customers only).
